title: Fresh Fermented Dutch Cherry Spring Rolls
description: A sour and crispy Dutch dish featuring cherries and ferment kimchi, perfect for a hangover cure, served on a lazy susan spinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together cherries, kimchi, sugar, vinegar, salt, and pepper.
Lay a spring roll wrapper on a flat surface and brush the edges with water.
Place about 1 tablespoon of the cherry kimchi mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Fold the bottom half of the wrapper over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the spring rolls to the skillet and fry until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the spring rolls from the oil and place them on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the spring rolls hot on a lazy susan spinner, garnished with sesame seeds.
